title: echium echioides
intro: Echium echioides, also known as the viper's bugloss or blueweed, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support respiratory health. Echium echioides is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and can also be found in capsule or powder form for easier consumption.
